name: Old Fashioned Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking pans or one 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter, sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes. Gradually mix in flour, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt with water alternately into the butter mixture until just combined. Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cooling for 10 minutes before removing from pans. Cool completely before frosting with chocolate frosting.
